mapper.sql: teaching_id, course_code, teach_year, class_no, teacher_id, college_id, max_students, time_place, status, enrolled_count, create_time, update_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_teaching(course_code, teach_year, class_no, teacher_id, college_id, max_students, time_place, status, enrolled_count, create_time, update_time, del_flag) values (#{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teachYear,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{classNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{maxStudents,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{timePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enrolledCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

update biz_teaching
course_code = #{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teach_year = #{teachYear,jdbcType=INTEGER},
class_no = #{classNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
max_students = #{maxStudents,jdbcType=INTEGER},
time_place = #{timePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
enrolled_count = #{enrolledCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_teaching set course_code = #{courseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teach_year = #{teachYear,jdbcType=INTEGER}, class_no = #{classNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teacher_id = #{teacherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, max_students = #{maxStudents,jdbcType=INTEGER}, time_place = #{timePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, enrolled_count = #{enrolledCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
